title: Nugen Raises Pre-Seed Funding
full_text: # Nugen Raises Pre-Seed Funding. **Nugen**, a Mumbai, India- and and San Francisco, CA-based based AI research startup, raised an undisclosed amount in Pre-Seed Funding. The round was led by Antler, with additional backing from Silicon Valley investors. The company intends to use the funds to expand operations and its development efforts. CO-founded by Aakash Patil and Mrunmayee Shende, Nugen is an AI research startup that develops the Domain-Aligned AI technology, enabling organizations to confidently deploy AI in high-stakes business environments. CO-founded by Aakash Patil and Mrunmayee Shende, Nugen is an AI research startup that develops the Domain-Aligned AI technology, enabling organizations to deploy AI in high-stakes business environments. Domain-Aligned AI™ technology enables alignment and steering of model behavior with domain-specific reasoning, enabling organizations to confidently deploy AI for business-focused outcomes while reducing expensive post-training and prompt engineering iterations. ### Trovy Raises $15M in Series A Funding. ### Hang Ten Systems Raises $32M in Seed Funding. #### THE DAILY NEWSLETTER - SIGNUP. / score=0.257 / query=AI agent startup raises seed Series A funding 2026 / intent=find_startups / path=capital_startup
